brief_justification: The XML contains only front/back metadata (abstracts, references) with no article body text. Based on available abstracts, this is a qualitative content analysis of Bolsonaro's 2018 electoral TV campaign (HGPE), examining how anti-corruption discourse aligned with Lava Jato narratives. The paper reports descriptive frequency of discursive axes (57.2% anti-corruption/anti-system mentions) but does not conduct quantitative empirical analysis with statistical models. It frames its argument around strategic coordination between accountability types, making implicit causal claims about how Lava Jato enabled Bolsonaro's electoral strategy without using formal causal language.
